title: Mobile user uninstalls the mobile app
scenario: Registered mobile user's status changes to inactive on Lens tenant after uninstalling the mobile app
steps: 1. Ensure a registered mobile user exists on the Lens tenant (Manage/Device Users page).
2. Have the user uninstall the mobile app from their device.
3. Navigate to the Manage/Device Users page on the Lens tenant.
4. Check the status of the user.
expected: The user's status on the Lens tenant (Manage/Device Users page) should change to "inactive".
